mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name, password, dept_name, use_yn, root_yn, auth_id, login_fail_cnt, password_change_dt, start_menu_id, work_location_code, work_type, desk_ip, dev_id, reg_dt, mod_dt FROM tb_login_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_login_user SET login_fail_cnt = #{cnt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
u.dept_name DESC, u.user_id u.use_yn DESC, u.user_id u.root_yn DESC, u.user_id a.auth_name DESC, u.user_id u.user_id DESC

u.user_id, u.user_name, u.dept_name, u.use_yn, u.root_yn, u.auth_id, u.start_menu_id, u.work_location_code, u.work_type, u.desk_ip, u.dev_id, u.reg_dt, u.mod_dt, a.auth_name AS auth_name, lo.code_name AS work_location_name
FROM tb_login_user u LEFT JOIN tb_menu_auth a ON a.auth_id = u.auth_id LEFT JOIN tb_common lo ON lo.cmm_id = 'LO' AND lo.code_id = u.work_location_code
mapper.select:
SELECT
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_login_user (user_id, user_name, password, dept_name, use_yn, root_yn, auth_id, start_menu_id, work_location_code, work_type, desk_ip, dev_id, password_change_dt) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{deptName}, ISNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), ISNULL(#{rootYn}, 'N'), #{authId}, #{startMenuId}, #{workLocationCode}, #{workType}, #{deskIp}, #{devId}, getdate())
